mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mag_project_member (project_id, user_id, role_in_project) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{userId}, #{roleInProject})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mag_project_member WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.username, u.nickname FROM mag_project_member m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY m.id
SELECT role_in_project FROM mag_project_member WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mag_project_member WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId}
